test_cases.description: Summarize a short pull request description
test_cases.input: Summarize in one sentence: This PR adds cached responses, improves error output, and updates the CI docs.
test_cases.expected_output: The PR adds caching, improves errors, and updates CI docs.

test_cases.description: Classify a CI incident as blocking
test_cases.input: Classify as blocking or non-blocking: The release workflow cannot upload artifacts.

test_cases.description: Answer a repository question from context
test_cases.expected_output: The publish workflow publishes the package from .github/workflows/publish.yml.
test_cases.context: Repository workflows: ci.yml runs tests. publish.yml builds and publishes releases.
